tool_args.label: Availability Definition
tool_args.raw_text: Availability measures the percent of time that a unit is running and available for customer service.

payload.claim_text: Availability measures the percent of time that a unit is running and available for customer service.
payload.description: Definition of availability metric used in the report
payload.subject: availability metric

evidence_refs.source_quote: Availability measures the percent of time that a unit is running and available for customer service.

tool_args.label: Injury and Entrapment Definitions
tool_args.raw_text: Mechanical includes sudden changes in speed, handrail, alignment. Human Factor includes lost balance, encumbrances, Slip/Trip/Fall, pushed/shoved, intoxication, caught between, etc. Entrapment is defined when customers are removed from an elevator with special tools or training. These events require intervention but not necessarily involve a customer injury.

payload.claim_text: Mechanical includes sudden changes in speed, handrail, alignment. Human Factor includes lost balance, encumbrances, Slip/Trip/Fall, pushed/shoved, intoxication, caught between, etc. Entrapment is defined when customers are removed from an elevator with special tools or training. These events require intervention but not necessarily involve a customer injury.
